peripheral_notes.summary: Header pins with documented native USB data functions.

notes: Function pin-1 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label USB_SEL.
USB interface switch signal. High enables the USB_HOST interface; low default enables the USB_DEV interface.
The official guide says USB_SEL is pulled low by default.
Function pin-2 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label USB_D-.
Connected to USB D- through the board USB interface switch circuit.
Function pin-3 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label USB_D+.
Connected to USB D+ through the board USB interface switch circuit.
Function pin-4 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LED_GREEN.
On-board green LED. The official guide says the LED is lit when this signal is high.
Function pin-5 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LED_YELLOW.
On-board yellow LED. The official guide says the LED is lit when this signal is high.
Function pin-6 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label BUTTON_OK.
OK button. The official guide says this signal is low when pressed.
Function pin-7 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label BUTTON_DW.
Down button. The official guide says this signal is low when pressed.
Function pin-8 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label BUTTON_UP.
UP button. The official guide says this signal is low when pressed.
Function pin-9 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label BUTTON_MENU.
MENU button. The official guide says this signal is low when pressed.
Function pin-10 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LCD_RET.
LCD reset signal. The official guide says low resets the LCD.
Function pin-11 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LCD_EN.
LCD enable signal. The official guide says low enables the LCD.
Function pin-12 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LCD_DC.
LCD data/command select signal.
Function pin-13 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LCD_SCLK.
LCD SPI clock signal.
Function pin-14 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LCD_SDA.
LCD SPI MOSI signal.
Function pin-15 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LCD_BL.
LCD backlight control signal.
Function pin-16 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label SD_SCK.
MicroSD clock signal. The official guide lists SD SPI CLK / SDIO CLK.
Function pin-17 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label SD_DO.
MicroSD data output. The official guide lists SD SPI MISO / SDIO Data0.
Function pin-18 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label SD_D1.
MicroSD SDIO Data1 signal.
Function pin-19 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label SD_D2.
MicroSD SDIO Data2 signal.
Function pin-20 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label SD_D3.
MicroSD chip select / Data3. The official guide lists SD SPI CS / SDIO Data3.
Function pin-21 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label HOST_VOL.
USB_DEV voltage monitoring signal, ADC1 channel 0.
Function pin-22 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label BAT_VOL.
Battery voltage monitoring signal, ADC1 channel 1.
Function pin-23 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label LIMIT_EN.
Current limiting IC enable signal. The official guide says high enables current limiting.
Function pin-24 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label 0VER_CURRENT.
Current overrun signal. The official guide says high level means overrun.
Function pin-25 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label DEV_VBUS_EN.
Device VBUS power enable signal. The official guide says high enables DEV_VBUS power supply.
Function pin-26 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Function pin table, label BOOST_EN.
Boost circuit enable signal. The official guide says high enables the boost circuit.
Extended pin-1 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Extended pin table, label FREE_1.
Official guide lists this extended pin as idle and customizable.
Extended pin-2 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Extended pin table, label FREE_2.
Official guide lists this extended pin as idle and customizable.
Extended pin-3 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Extended pin table, label FREE_3.
Official guide lists this extended pin as idle and customizable.
Extended pin-4 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Extended pin table, label FREE_4.
Official guide lists this extended pin as idle and customizable.
Extended pin-5 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Extended pin table, label FREE_5.
Official guide lists this extended pin as idle and customizable.
Extended pin-6 on the ESP32-S3-USB-OTG Extended pin table, label FREE_6.
Official guide lists this extended pin as idle and customizable.

general_warnings: Confirm the exact module variant before using header GPIOs reserved for on-module memory.
Review each listed caution before wiring a board-header GPIO.

power: Micro-USB powers the motherboard and display.
USB_DEV or battery mode can supply USB_HOST; battery mode uses BOOST_EN.
programming: Micro-USB USB-to-UART port is used for flashing, power, and serial communication.
onboard_hardware: USB_HOST, USB_DEV, USB switch, LCD connector, MicroSD slot, battery charger, buttons, and green/yellow LEDs.
